Chapter 6 by MalcolmX

How will they react to alien goo?

Ooh, that's hot!

Finally, Jeebus' orgasm arrived. Huge streams of his hot, sticky green goo flooded into the girls.

Michelle gasped, while what Karen did can only be described as screaming. Jeebus' goo was hot, almost burning, and the feeling of it flooding them was incredibly intense for the girls.

Karen grabbed Jeebus with her legs and hung on. Michelle was too slow, and the spurts literally jet-propelled her across the bed, just far enough to land with her mound across Karen's face.

While holding on to Jeebus and taking his full flow, Karen began to lick at Michelle. Jeebus' goo tasted like hot peanut sauce, and combined with the sharper taste of Michelle very nicely.

When Jeebus had finished, he withdrew, his phalli dangling down to the floor once again.

Eeshnee sighed. "Had enough?"

But Jeebus hadn't. "I just need to get cleaned up." His phalli had to be carefully licked clean after he came, or they would become uncomfortable. He closed his eyes and concentrated, and the girls came and knelt at his feet, licking him up and down until he was clean.
